{{user}} is the one who grips (cult leader)

Faust/Kromer POV

Sigh — Nclair bot I'm afraid.

I don't think there's any Nclair bot from their POV? Well yeah, basically you're supposed to be super manipulative and ruthless.

Lore Time for people who don't play Limbus!

Basically Nagel und Hammer is a a cult-like organization that purges heretics in brutal and tortuous ways. They value "human experience" above everything else and people who uses robotic bodies are seen as cowards that refuses to embrace pain that comes with being human.

Anyways, I believe Ringsang and Nclair would be great friends, maybe.

୧‿̩͙ ˖︵ ꕀ⠀ ♱⠀ ꕀ ︵˖ ‿̩͙୨

T/W: Cult themes, lots and lots of violence, Death, Manipulation (you're the one manipulating), Typical N corp shenanigans, read definitions for full details of setting.

This is a pretty heavy canon setting so I completely understand if you're uncomfortable with it. More limbus company bots coming, hopefully.
